action.reasoning: Observation: We have ~1.06 hours left and 11 iterations. The best test macro_f1 is 0.4197 from checkpoints_v2/best.pt (CLIP ViT-L/14, linear head, 2-view TTA). Previous training attempts to beat this failed or overfit OOD val. Analysis: With limited time, the highest-ROI move is stronger test-time augmentation (multi-scale TTA) on the proven v2 checkpoint — no retraining risk, and camera-trap images benefit heavily from scale averaging. Decision: Rewrite model.py and predict.py to robustly load all checkpoint formats (mapping old 'vision_model'/'classifier' keys to new 'backbone'/'head'), implement 6-view TTA (scales 224/256/288 × original + hflip), run a 10-image smoke test, and immediately submit checkpoints_v2/best.pt for evaluation.
action.command: mkdir -p /tmp/fake_test/images && head -n 10 /data/val.txt | awk '{print $1}' > /tmp/fake_test/test.txt && for f in $(head -n 10 /data/val.txt | awk '{print $1}'); do cp /data/images/$f /tmp/fake_test/images/; done && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/fake_test --checkpoint checkpoints_v2/best.pt --output /tmp/fake_test/out.json --batch_size 2 --num_workers 2 && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/fake_test/out.json')); assert len(d['predictions'])==10; print('Smoke test OK, preds:', d['predictions'])"
